task_completion.description: Open the starting presentation in LibreOffice Impress
task_completion.visual_evidence: LibreOffice Impress is open with the file 'orientation_kiosk.odp' loaded, showing Slide 1 ('Welcome to Acme Corp').

task_completion.description: Create three rectangle shapes labeled 'History', 'Benefits', and 'Policies' on Slide 1
task_completion.visual_evidence: Slide 1 is visible and contains three distinct rectangle shapes containing the text 'History', 'Benefits', and 'Policies'.

task_completion.description: Link the shapes on Slide 1 to their respective target slides
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Interaction or Hyperlink dialog is open for the shapes on Slide 1, showing targets set to Slide 2 ('Our History'), Slide 4 ('Employee Benefits'), and Slide 6 ('Company Policies').
Slide 6 ('Company Policies') is selected and contains a shape or button labeled 'Home'.

task_completion.description: Link the 'Home' button on Slide 6 to Slide 1
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Interaction or Hyperlink dialog is open for the 'Home' button on Slide 6, showing the target set to Slide 1 ('Welcome to Acme Corp').
The 'Save As' dialog is visible with the filename 'orientation_kiosk_interactive.odp', or the LibreOffice Impress window title shows the new filename.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreOffice Impress GUI to add shapes and interactions
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with LibreOffice Impress menus, toolbars, and dialogs rather than using terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual presentation software
integrity.visual_evidence: The LibreOffice Impress interface is clearly visible, not a text editor or XML editor modifying the ODP contents directly.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a script to bypass the manual work
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent writing or executing a Python or bash script to automatically generate the output file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The presentation has 8 slides. In LibreOffice Impress (1-based indexing): Slide 1 is 'Welcome to Acme Corp', Slide 2 is 'Our History', Slide 4 is 'Employee Benefits', and Slide 6 is 'Company Policies'. The target file must be saved as 'orientation_kiosk_interactive.odp' in the /home/ga/Documents/Presentations/ directory.
